title: Ethical, Inclusive, and Accessible User Research · Decision Retrieval
summary: A delayed review reconstructs ethical, inclusive, and accessible user research from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for consented inclusive research packet after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.
Recruit relevant variation in ability, device, language, connectivity, role, and problem experience without claiming representativeness.
Explain purpose, recording, storage, withdrawal, incentives, and power relationships in accessible consent before participation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Research Question · changed case · Review Research Question
steps.instruction:
review case — A research plan recruits only friends, records full sessions indefinitely, and excludes participants who need captions, flexible timing, or nonvisual materials. The review variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.

Which action demonstrates Research Question without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Research Question · changed case · Review Research Question.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution. For Research Question · changed case · Review Research Question, keep Research Question connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

stimulus.title: Synthesis Contradiction case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A majority theme permits discarding contradictory or accessibility-specific evidence.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Synthesize patterns with source links, counterevidence, minority needs, uncertainty, and quotations short enough to protect identity. Artifact under review: consented inclusive research packet.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Synthesis Contradiction, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

content.title: Evidence defense
